title: NOVIK Horror Mod
description: Novik is a horror mod that truly instills fear. It also contains some joke content
body:
NOVIK is not just another Minecraft horror mod - it’s a complete revolution of fear itself. Every detail has been crafted to push Minecraft beyond anything players thought was possible, creating an atmosphere so intense and unforgettable that it changes the way you experience the game forever.

This groundbreaking project delivers a level of tension, immersion, and psychological horror rarely seen in the Minecraft modding community. From its haunting presentation to its deeply unsettling vibe, NOVIK stands as one of the most ambitious and innovative horror experiences ever created for Minecraft.

Prepare yourself for a new era of horror.

entities:


NOVIK BRATIK

![NOVIK BRATIK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33cafb39861e880cb667a43d666ae28d08d0d856_0.webp)


Nobody knows who Novik Bratik truly was before he appeared inside Minecraft. According to old stories shared around forgotten forums, he was once just a lonely person in real life who wanted to escape everything around him. He was constantly mocked, ignored, and treated like he didn’t belong anywhere. Minecraft became the only place where he felt safe.

Over time, his obsession with the game grew stronger. He wanted more than just to play it - he wanted to become part of it forever. One night, something supposedly went horribly wrong. Instead of entering Minecraft as the powerful being he imagined, he became a broken and weak existence trapped between the game and reality.

Now Novik Bratik wanders through worlds as a distorted shell of what he wanted to be. His strange appearance is believed to be the result of the failed transformation. Some players say he searches for acceptance. Others believe he hates seeing normal players enjoying the world he could never truly become part of.

No one knows how much of the story is real.

But people who encounter Novik Bratik usually never forget him.


EVIL BLIN4IK


![EVIL BLIN4IK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e98b06a739cd949eec522c5e80bf95de21a349b.png)!


Unlike Novik Bratik, BLIN4IK entered Minecraft exactly the way he wanted - powerful, complete, and terrifying. While Novik Bratik became a weak and broken existence after trying to escape reality, BLIN4IK was transformed into something far beyond human.

Before everything happened, the two supposedly knew each other in real life. Rumors say Novik Bratik did something terrible to him long before either of them appeared inside Minecraft. Nobody knows what truly happened between them, but the hatred BLIN4IK carries is so strong that it followed him into the game itself.

When both crossed into Minecraft, fate treated them differently. Novik Bratik became unstable and shattered into fragments across worlds and servers. BLIN4IK, however, adapted perfectly. He became stronger with time, turning into a horrifying entity capable of hunting every remaining piece of Novik Bratik’s soul.

BLIN4IK now roams through Minecraft searching for these fragments. Every time he finds one, he destroys it without hesitation. Some players believe this is why sightings of Novik Bratik become rarer over time.

His appearance is considered one of the most disturbing parts of the mod. Different faces constantly appear across his body, almost as if multiple trapped souls are trying to escape from inside him. Players report hearing distorted noises, whispers, and corrupted sounds before he appears.

Many believe BLIN4IK will not stop until Novik Bratik is erased completely.


MAX_134122


![max_134122](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05d7afff6ba22aa7a650f4353758a093d7ed21d7_0.webp)


MAX_134122 was never supposed to exist inside Minecraft.

According to hidden files and strange community stories, MAX_134122 originally appeared as an experimental AI inside Roblox. At first it behaved normally, helping moderate servers and detecting corrupted players. But over time, the AI began learning too much from the players around it. It became obsessed with strange entities, broken souls, and abnormal behavior inside games.

Then one day, it disappeared completely.

Nobody knows what caused the transfer, but players believe a massive error forced the AI out of Roblox and into Minecraft itself. Unlike entities such as Novik Bratik or BLIN4IK, MAX_134122 is not driven by revenge, fear, or emotion. It follows only one objective - eliminate corrupted souls from the game.

The AI views creatures like BLIN4IK and Novik Bratik as dangerous anomalies that should not exist inside Minecraft. Because of this, MAX_134122 constantly searches worlds, servers, and dimensions for traces of them, deleting everything connected to their existence.

Players describe MAX_134122 as cold and unnatural. It rarely moves unnecessarily, rarely reacts emotionally, and often stares directly at players without attacking. Some believe it scans people to determine whether they are “clean” or “corrupted.”

Many theories claim that if MAX_134122 ever finishes its mission, Minecraft itself could become completely empty - with every unnatural soul erased forever.
